message:
Apply rustfmt formatting cleanup across 8 files

Formatting-only changes with no behavioral impact, applied by rustfmt
to satisfy consistent style after recent edits.

- src/lib.rs: alphabetize module declarations (migration before monitor)
- src/gen_server.rs: reorder test imports (parking_lot before std)
- src/service/service.rs: reformat chained method call for timeout
- src/sync/mod.rs: remove trailing blank line
- src/time/driver.rs: reformat compare_exchange_weak call chain and
  compact single-line assert_with_log invocation
- src/tls/acceptor.rs: wrap long ALPN negotiation chain
- src/tls/connector.rs: wrap long ALPN negotiation chain
- tests/notify_bug.rs: expand assert macros to multi-line format

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
